query:
CREATE TABLE `accounts_new` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `channel` enum('whatsapp','instagram','email') NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `identifier` varchar(320) DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('connecting','connected','disconnected','active','inactive','error') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'disconnected',
  `waSessionData` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `waQrCode` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `igAccessToken` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `igUserId` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `imapHost` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `imapPort` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `imapUser` varchar(320) DEFAULT NULL,
  `imapPassword` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `smtpHost` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `smtpPort` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `smtpUser` varchar(320) DEFAULT NULL,
  `smtpPassword` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `smtpSecure` tinyint(1) DEFAULT 1,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);
